title: betula chinensis var. collina
intro: Betula chinensis var. collina, also known as Chinese silver birch, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the Betulaceae family. Traditionally, the plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in Chinese and Tibetan folk medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Chinese silver birch include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory health. Chinese silver birch can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and bark can also be used in herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions.
